overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character moves from a covered walkway under an overpass, across a wet street, and along busy commercial sidewalks with dense crowds and holographic advertisements.

events.description: exiting covered overpass area and approaching open street crossing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass toward the street crossing ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: red illuminated sign reading Palm View mounted on the overpass structure
concrete overpass with geometric ceiling panels and support columns
large digital screens displaying pink and white advertisements on building facade
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a concrete overpass marked by a red Palm View sign. The area is dimly lit with mixed lighting from overhead structures and distant neon signs. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the ambient light as the character approaches an open street crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: stepping onto yellow striped crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street via broad yellow crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the street with headlights on

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on dark asphalt
low-rise commercial building with dark facade and entranceway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into the open street, crossing a wide yellow crosswalk. Vehicles pass by on the right as the character moves toward the opposite sidewalk. The wet pavement reflects the city lights, and the skyscrapers loom larger in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with neon advertising walls

events.description: passing a pedestrian with distinctive red mohawk and bright green shoes walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense crowds of pedestrians on the neon-lit commercial sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red mohawk, black shirt, and green shoes walking toward camera
person leaning against wall near neon displays

entered.detail: series of large vertical digital screens showing colorful advertisements and animations
brightly lit food cart with red and green neon signage
red rope barriers lining the sidewalk edge separating pedestrians from street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a crowded commercial sidewalk lined with vibrant neon wall displays on the left. The dense crowd moves in mixed directions, and the character passes a food vending stall and red rope barriers on the right. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights from the advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian promenade with benches and large digital displays

events.description: approaching large illuminated vertical billboard that brightens the surrounding area

agents.ego_description: walking along less crowded sidewalk passing empty benches and approaching a large digital display

entered.detail: metal and concrete benches lined along the sidewalk edge
tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying bright white and pink content
vertical blue neon light strips mounted on building columns

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk opens up with fewer pedestrians and empty benches lining the right side. The character approaches a massive vertical billboard that illuminates the area with bright white light. Blue neon pillar lights line the left side of the walkway, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit underpass into the vibrant, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins beneath a concrete overpass marked by a red Palm View sign, where the character moves across wet sidewalks reflecting muted ambient light. As the character emerges from the cover of the overpass, the scene opens into a wide street crossing with yellow markings and passing vehicles, allowing the towering skyscrapers to loom larger in the background. The camera then shifts toward a crowded commercial sidewalk lined with vibrant neon wall displays and food stalls, weaving through a dense flow of pedestrians. Finally, the crowd thins as the walkway opens up toward empty benches and blue neon pillars, culminating in the approach of a massive vertical billboard that floods the wet pavement with bright white light.
